select: /* kr.dku.univ.mcqi.tcqi.repository.TcqiMapper.findLcqiMaster */ SELECT YY ,ORGID ,PFLT_ID ,CQI_DIV_CD ,NVL(SUBMIT_YN, 'N') AS SUBMIT_YN ,SUBMIT_UID ,TO_CHAR(SUBMIT_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS SUBMIT_DM ,NVL(CLOSE_YN, 'N') AS CLOSE_YN ,CLOSE_UID ,TO_CHAR(CLOSE_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS CLOSE_DM ,INPUT_UID ,TO_CHAR(INPUT_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS INPUT_DM ,LTST_UPD_UID ,TO_CHAR(LTST_UPD_DM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS LTST_UPD_DM FROM UNIV.MCQI_MASTER WHERE YY = #{yy} AND ORGID = #{orgid} AND PFLT_ID = #{pfltId} AND CQI_DIV_CD = '0002'

/* kr.dku.univ.mcqi.tcqi.repository.TcqiMapper.findLcqiPrevSectList */ SELECT CQI_SECT_CD ,CQI_TYPE_CD ,CHOI_CD ,ANS_TYPE_CD ,CONT ,SORT_ORD FROM UNIV.MCQI_SECT_DSC WHERE YY = TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(#{yy}) - 1) AND ORGID = #{orgid} AND PFLT_ID = #{pfltId} AND CQI_DIV_CD = '0002' AND CQI_TYPE_CD = '03' /* 이번년도개선계획 → 다음연도 전년도개선계획으로 이월 */ ORDER BY CQI_SECT_CD, SORT_ORD, CHOI_CD
